title: `podman search --list-tags` ignores  `--format`
body:
### Issue Description

Hello. _TAG_-column exhibited despite `.Tag`, the attribute it is governed by, is not specified for `--format`.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

```
$ podman search --list-tags --format "{{.Name}}" --limit 1 docker.io/library/httpd
NAME                     TAG
docker.io/library/httpd  2
```

### Describe the results you received

_TAG_-column exhibited.

### Describe the results you expected

_TAG_-column not exhibited.

comments.body:
Thanks for filing the issue, @Ricky-Tigg!

I can reproduce but only with the `--list-tags`.
